findings.message: New data-access query path 'get_item_by_name' lacks observability instrumentation: no metrics, spans, or error logging with correlation ID. The unbounded query on potentially unindexed column 'Item.name' has no latency or row-count metric.
findings.suggestion: Wrap the database query with timing instrumentation (emit latency metric), add an OpenTelemetry span context, and ensure errors are logged with the current correlation ID. Consider adding a database index on 'Item.name' if performance is critical, and emit a row-count metric to detect slow queries.
